short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainians; the Iran deal progress is the most relevant new signal as it could further divert US diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine support.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly close to signing
top_events.summary: A near-finalized US-Iran deal risks diverting Washington's diplomatic bandwidth and resources away from Ukraine at a critical moment, potentially weakening Western support pressure on Russia.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK seizure of a Russian shadow fleet tanker tightens sanctions enforcement, potentially reducing Russia's oil revenues that fund the war — a modest positive for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: Russian families using AI to recreate deceased soldiers reflects the scale of Russian casualties; no direct military impact on Ukraine but signals continued Russian public awareness of war costs.
